task_description: Build a Chinese-friendly UI style showcase gallery system based on ui-ux-pro-max source data. Features 67 UI styles with live demos, 161 product recommendations, Chinese AI prompts, search/filter, responsive design. Test coverage >= 90%. Iteratively improved over 20 rounds.

verification.summary: Build produces optimized static site with code splitting (5 chunks). 189 tests all pass. Coverage: 99.73% statements, 96.11% branches, 94.33% functions, 99.73% lines - all above the 90% threshold. Review findings addressed: dead exports removed, Chinese prompts fixed, debounce added, category field removed, product names translated.
